= Contents =
  - [[#git|git]]
      - [[#git#tips and tricks|tips and tricks]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#checkout one file|checkout one file]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#checkout remote branch|checkout remote branch]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#delete local branch|delete local branch]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#delete remote branch|delete remote branch]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#diff with branch|diff with branch]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#push to remote|push to remote]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#push to remote (diff name)|push to remote (diff name)]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#stash: apply 1 file|stash: apply 1 file]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#stash: clear|stash: clear]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#stash: show|stash: show]]
        - [[#git#tips and tricks#submodules: update|submodules: update]]

= git =

=== tips and tricks ===

==== checkout one file ====
{{{
   git checkout $commit_hash -- $filename
}}}

==== checkout remote branch ====
{{{
   git checkout $remote_branch
}}}

==== delete local branch ====
{{{
   git branch -d $branch
}}}

==== delete remote branch ====
{{{
   git push origin --delete $remote_branch
}}}

==== diff with branch ====
{{{
   git diff --name-only $branch
}}}

==== push to remote ====
{{{
   git push -u $remote $branch
}}}

==== push to remote (diff name) ====
{{{
   git push -u $remote HEAD:$remote_branch
}}}

==== stash: apply 1 file ====
{{{
   git checkout stash@{0} -- $file
}}}

==== stash: clear ====
{{{
   git stash clear
}}}

==== stash: show ====
{{{
   git stash show -p
}}}

==== submodules: update ====
{{{
   git submodule update --recursive --remote
 }}}
